zh: 阴阳离决可导致生命活动终止。
en: Separation of Yin and Yang can lead to termination of life activities.

zh: 五行相乘表示相克太过。
en: Over-restriction among the five elements means excessive restriction.

zh: 五行相侮表示反向克制。
en: Counter-restriction among the five elements means reverse restraint.

zh: 木郁可以影响肝的疏泄功能。
en: Constraint of wood can affect the liver’s free-coursing function.

zh: 土虚可以影响脾的运化功能。
en: Deficiency of earth can affect the spleen’s transportation and transformation.

zh: 金失肃降可以影响肺气运行。
en: Failure of metal to descend can affect the movement of lung-Qi.

zh: 水亏不能涵养肝木。
en: Deficiency of water fails to nourish liver wood.

zh: 心阳推动血液温通脉道。
en: Heart Yang propels blood and warms the vessels to keep them free-flowing.

zh: 心血充盈有助于神志安定。
en: Abundant heart blood helps stabilize mental activities.

zh: 肺气宣发推动卫气外达肌表。
en: The dispersing action of lung-Qi drives defensive Qi outward to the superficies.

zh: 肺气肃降促使津液下输。
en: The descending action of lung-Qi promotes downward distribution of body fluids.

zh: 脾气升清维持清阳上达。
en: Spleen-Qi ascending the clear maintains the upward movement of clear Yang.

zh: 脾虚不运容易形成湿浊。
en: Spleen deficiency with failure of transportation easily forms damp turbidity.

zh: 肝血不足可使筋脉拘急。
en: Insufficiency of liver blood can cause contraction of tendons and vessels.

zh: 肝气条达有助于情志舒畅。
en: Smooth Liver-Qi helps maintain free flow of emotions.

zh: 肾气充盛可以固摄二阴。
en: Abundant kidney-Qi can secure the two lower orifices.

zh: 肾精亏少会影响髓海充养。
en: Depletion of kidney essence can affect nourishment of the sea of marrow.

zh: 胃气通降保证水谷下行。
en: Free descent of stomach-Qi ensures downward movement of food and drink.

zh: 小肠泌别清浊影响水液代谢。
en: The small intestine’s separation of the clear and turbid affects water metabolism.

zh: 大肠传导功能依赖津液濡润。
en: The large intestine’s transportation function depends on moistening by body fluids.

zh: 膀胱气化功能依赖肾气推动。
en: Qi transformation of the urinary bladder depends on the propulsion of kidney-Qi.

zh: 奇经调蓄十二经脉气血。
en: The extraordinary vessels regulate and store Qi and blood of the twelve regular channels.

zh: 络脉分布全身以加强经脉联系。
en: Collaterals distribute throughout the body to strengthen connections among channels.

zh: 经气通畅可以维持肢体活动。
en: Smooth channel-Qi can maintain movement of the limbs.

zh: 经络失养可导致麻木不仁。
en: Malnourishment of the meridians can cause numbness and insensitivity.

zh: 卫分受邪多表现为表热证。
en: Pathogenic invasion of the defense level often manifests as exterior heat syndrome.

zh: 气分热盛可导致津液耗伤。
en: Exuberant heat at the Qi level can consume body fluids.

zh: 营分受热可扰动心神。
en: Heat entering the nutrient level can disturb the mind.

zh: 血分热盛可迫血外溢。
en: Exuberant heat at the blood level can force blood to spill outward.

zh: 三焦辨证可以判断温病传变部位。
en: Triple-Jiao differentiation can determine the transmission location of warm diseases.

zh: 上焦受邪多影响肺卫。
en: Pathogenic invasion of the upper Jiao often affects the lung-defense system.

zh: 中焦湿热可阻碍脾胃升降。
en: Dampness-heat in the middle Jiao can obstruct ascent and descent of the spleen and stomach.

zh: 下焦阴伤可影响肝肾濡养。
en: Yin damage in the lower Jiao can affect nourishment of the liver and kidneys.

zh: 小儿肺卫薄弱容易感受风邪。
en: Weak lung-defense in children makes them susceptible to wind pathogens.

zh: 小儿脾常不足容易形成食积。
en: Constant spleen insufficiency in children easily forms food accumulation.

zh: 小儿肾气未盛可影响骨骼发育。
en: Underdeveloped kidney-Qi in children can affect bone development.

zh: 疮疡初起红肿热痛多属阳证。
en: Sores and ulcers with initial redness, swelling, heat and pain mostly belong to Yang syndrome.

zh: 疮疡日久色暗不鲜多属阴证。
en: Chronic sores and ulcers with dull dark color mostly belong to Yin syndrome.

zh: 脓液臭秽多提示邪毒较盛。
en: Foul-smelling pus often indicates exuberance of pathogenic toxins.

zh: 疮面肉芽红活多提示气血来复。
en: Fresh red granulation on the wound surface often indicates recovery of Qi and blood.

zh: 窦道形成常提示毒邪留滞。
en: Formation of a sinus tract often indicates lingering pathogenic toxins.

zh: 肝属木，心属火。
en: The liver pertains to wood, and the heart pertains to fire.

zh: 脾属土，肺属金。
en: The spleen pertains to earth, and the lungs pertain to metal.

zh: 肾属水。
en: The kidneys pertain to water.

zh: 肝主升发，肺主肃降。
en: The liver governs ascending and effusion, while the lungs govern purification and descent.

zh: 脾主升清，胃主降浊。
en: The spleen governs ascending the clear, while the stomach governs descending the turbid.

zh: 心火温煦全身阳气。
en: Heart fire warms Yang-Qi throughout the body.

zh: 肾水滋养全身阴液。
en: Kidney water nourishes Yin fluid throughout the body.

zh: 肝木条达有助于气机舒畅。
en: Free unfolding of liver wood helps Qi movement remain smooth.

zh: 肺金清肃有助于水道通调。
en: Purification and descent of lung metal help regulate the water pathways.

zh: 脾土健运有助于精微化生。
en: Proper movement of spleen earth helps generate essence.

zh: 气为血之帅。
en: Qi is the commander of blood.

zh: 血为气之母。
en: Blood is the mother of Qi.

zh: 气行则血行。
en: When Qi moves, blood moves.

zh: 气滞则血瘀。
en: When Qi stagnates, blood becomes static.

zh: 血脱可导致气脱。
en: Blood desertion can lead to Qi desertion.

zh: 津液充足可以维持肌肤润泽。
en: Sufficient body fluids maintain the moistness of the skin.

zh: 津液亏少可导致腠理干涩。
en: Deficiency of body fluids can make the striae dry.

zh: 肺气宣发布散津液于皮毛。
en: Lung-Qi disperses body fluids to the skin and hair.

zh: 脾气转输水谷精微。
en: Spleen-Qi transports the essence of food and drink.

zh: 肾气蒸化水液。
en: Kidney-Qi steams and transforms body fluids.

zh: 三焦通调水道以运行津液。
en: The triple Jiao regulates the water pathways to move body fluids.

zh: 胆汁排泄不畅可影响饮食消化。
en: Impaired bile excretion can affect digestion of food and drink.

zh: 胃气下降保证糟粕下传。
en: Descent of stomach-Qi ensures downward transmission of waste.

zh: 大肠津亏可使粪便干结。
en: Fluid deficiency in the large intestine can make stools dry and bound.

zh: 膀胱气化有助于尿液排出。
en: Qi transformation of the urinary bladder helps urine excretion.

zh: 女子胞功能依赖肝肾和冲任。
en: The function of the uterus depends on the liver, kidneys, Thoroughfare and Conception vessels.

zh: 冲脉血海充盛有助于月经调畅。
en: Abundance of the blood sea of the Thoroughfare Vessel helps menstruation remain regular.

zh: 任脉通畅有助于胞胎功能。
en: Free flow of the Conception Vessel helps uterine and fetal functions.

zh: 督脉阳气充盛可温煦全身。
en: Abundant Yang-Qi in the Governor Vessel can warm the whole body.

zh: 带脉失约可影响诸经约束。
en: Failure of the Belt Vessel to bind can affect restraint of the channels.

zh: 经筋失养可导致筋脉拘挛。
en: Malnourishment of the channel-musculatures can cause contraction of tendons and vessels.

zh: 皮部受邪可通过经络内传。
en: Pathogens invading the skin regions can transmit inward through the meridians.

zh: 腧穴反应可以提示经络病变。
en: Responses at acupoints can indicate meridian disorders.

zh: 表邪未解可继续向里传变。
en: Unresolved exterior pathogens can continue to transmit inward.

zh: 里热炽盛可耗气伤津。
en: Exuberant interior heat can consume Qi and injure body fluids.

zh: 寒邪直中可损伤脾肾阳气。
en: Direct invasion by cold pathogen can damage Yang-Qi of the spleen and kidneys.

zh: 湿热下注可影响膀胱气化。
en: Downward flow of dampness-heat can affect urinary-bladder Qi transformation.

zh: 痰热上扰可蒙蔽清窍。
en: Phlegm-heat disturbing upward can cloud the clear orifices.

zh: 瘀血阻络可使疼痛夜间加重。
en: Blood stasis obstructing collaterals can worsen pain at night.

zh: 气虚推动无力可导致瘀阻。
en: Weak propulsion due to Qi deficiency can lead to stasis obstruction.

zh: 小儿风热犯肺可导致咳嗽发热。
en: Wind-heat invading the lungs in children can cause cough and fever.

zh: 小儿痰热壅肺可导致喘促痰鸣。
en: Phlegm-heat obstructing the lungs in children can cause panting and phlegm rale.

zh: 小儿脾虚夹湿可导致食少便溏。
en: Spleen deficiency with dampness in children can cause poor intake and loose stool.

zh: 小儿肾虚不固可导致遗尿频作。
en: Kidney deficiency with insecurity in children can cause recurrent enuresis.

zh: 小儿肝风内动可导致惊厥抽搐。
en: Internal stirring of liver wind in children can cause convulsions.

zh: 外科热毒炽盛可使局部红肿明显。
en: Exuberant heat toxin in surgery can make local redness and swelling obvious.

zh: 外科寒湿凝滞可使肿块平塌。
en: Cold-dampness stagnation in surgery can make swelling flat.

zh: 外科气血不足可使脓液清稀。
en: Deficiency of Qi and blood in surgery can make pus clear and thin.

zh: 外科毒邪壅滞可使脓苔难脱。
en: Accumulation of surgical toxins can make pus coating difficult to remove.

zh: 正气来复可促进疮面收敛。
en: Recovery of healthy Qi can promote wound contraction.

zh: 心气亏虚可使血脉鼓动无力。
en: Deficiency of heart-Qi can weaken the pulsation of the blood vessels.

zh: 心阳亏虚可使胸阳不振。
en: Deficiency of heart Yang can weaken chest Yang.

zh: 心血不足可使面色失华。
en: Insufficiency of heart blood can make the complexion lose luster.

zh: 心阴不足可使虚热内扰。
en: Insufficiency of heart Yin can allow deficiency heat to disturb internally.

zh: 痰迷心窍可导致意识不清。
en: Phlegm clouding the heart orifices can cause unclear consciousness.

zh: 肺气郁闭可使呼吸不利。
en: Stagnation and obstruction of lung-Qi can make respiration difficult.

zh: 肺热炽盛可迫津外泄。
en: Exuberant lung heat can force body fluids to discharge outward.

zh: 肺燥失润可导致干咳。
en: Dryness of the lungs with loss of moisture can cause dry cough.

zh: 肺虚失宣可使卫表不固。
en: Lung deficiency with failure to disperse can make the defensive exterior insecure.

zh: 脾气亏虚可使中焦运化无力。
en: Deficiency of spleen-Qi can weaken transportation and transformation in the middle Jiao.

zh: 脾阳虚弱可使水湿不化。
en: Weakness of spleen Yang can prevent transformation of water-dampness.

zh: 脾虚湿盛可使清阳不升。
en: Spleen deficiency with exuberant dampness can prevent clear Yang from ascending.

zh: 脾胃不和可使升降失常。
en: Disharmony between the spleen and stomach can disorder ascent and descent.

zh: 肝郁气滞可使经络不畅。
en: Liver depression with Qi stagnation can make the meridians unsmooth.

zh: 肝火扰上可使头目胀痛。
en: Liver fire disturbing upward can cause distending pain of the head and eyes.

zh: 肝阴不足可使肝阳偏亢。
en: Insufficiency of liver Yin can cause relative hyperactivity of liver Yang.

zh: 肝血亏虚可使爪甲失荣。
en: Deficiency of liver blood can deprive the nails of nourishment.

zh: 肾气亏虚可使摄纳无权。
en: Deficiency of kidney-Qi can impair the power of reception.

zh: 肾阴亏耗可使虚火内生。
en: Depletion of kidney Yin can generate deficiency fire internally.

zh: 肾阳不足可使命门火弱。
en: Insufficiency of kidney Yang can weaken Mingmen fire.

zh: 肾精不足可使骨髓失充。
en: Insufficiency of kidney essence can deprive bone marrow of fullness.

zh: 胃热内盛可使胃气上逆。
en: Internal exuberance of stomach heat can cause upward reversal of stomach-Qi.

zh: 胃阴亏虚可使胃失濡润。
en: Deficiency of stomach Yin can deprive the stomach of moisture.

zh: 大肠湿热可影响传导功能。
en: Dampness-heat in the large intestine can affect its transportation function.

zh: 膀胱气化不利可使水液停聚。
en: Impaired Qi transformation of the urinary bladder can cause retention of body fluids.

zh: 气虚无力可使津液输布迟缓。
en: Weakness due to Qi deficiency can slow the distribution of body fluids.

zh: 气滞不行可使津液停聚成痰。
en: Qi stagnation with failure of movement can cause body fluids to accumulate into phlegm.

zh: 血瘀不散可阻碍新血化生。
en: Unresolved blood stasis can obstruct the production of new blood.

zh: 津液外泄过多可导致气随津脱。
en: Excessive outward loss of body fluids can cause Qi to desert with fluids.

zh: 痰浊上蒙可阻蔽清窍。
en: Turbid phlegm clouding upward can block the clear orifices.

zh: 水饮停肺可使肺气上逆。
en: Water-fluid retained in the lungs can cause upward reversal of lung-Qi.

zh: 寒湿困阻可使经脉收引。
en: Obstruction by cold-dampness can cause contraction of the channels.

zh: 湿热熏蒸可使黄疸加重。
en: Steaming of dampness-heat can aggravate jaundice.

zh: 风热郁表可使疹出不畅。
en: Wind-heat constrained in the exterior can hinder eruption.

zh: 温毒犯表可使腮部肿痛。
en: Warm toxin invading the exterior can cause swelling and pain of the parotid region.

zh: 小儿肺气不足可使咳嗽迁延。
en: Insufficiency of lung-Qi in children can make cough linger.

zh: 小儿脾胃失调可使食积内停。
en: Spleen-stomach dysfunction in children can cause internal retention of food accumulation.

zh: 小儿肾精亏虚可影响囟门闭合。
en: Deficiency of kidney essence in children can affect closure of the fontanel.

zh: 小儿心脾不足可使神志不宁。
en: Deficiency of the heart and spleen in children can make the mind restless.

zh: 小儿肝阳偏亢可导致烦躁易怒。
en: Hyperactivity of liver Yang in children can cause irritability and anger.

zh: 小儿湿热蕴结可导致小便短赤。
en: Accumulation of dampness-heat in children can cause scanty reddish urine.

zh: 外科阳毒壅盛可使肿势高突。
en: Exuberant Yang toxin in surgery can make swelling elevated.

zh: 外科阴寒凝滞可使疼痛隐隐。
en: Yin-cold stagnation in surgery can cause dull pain.

zh: 外科脓成未溃可见跳痛明显。
en: Formed pus without rupture in surgery can show obvious throbbing pain.

zh: 外科脓腐未尽可使疮面不鲜。
en: Retained pus and slough in surgery can make the wound surface unhealthy.

zh: 外科气血来复可使肉芽鲜红。
en: Recovery of Qi and blood in surgery can make granulation fresh and red.

zh: 外科毒邪内攻可影响脏腑功能。
en: Internal attack by surgical toxins can affect Zang-Fu functions.

zh: 外科正虚邪恋可使病程迁延。
en: Deficiency of healthy Qi with lingering pathogens in surgery can prolong the disease course.

zh: 有神状态常反映正气未衰。
en: A state of vitality often reflects that healthy Qi has not declined.

zh: 少神状态常提示正气不足。
en: Reduced vitality often indicates insufficiency of healthy Qi.

zh: 失神状态多提示精气衰败。
en: Loss of vitality often indicates decline of essence and Qi.

zh: 假神出现多提示阴阳即将离决。
en: False vitality often indicates impending separation of Yin and Yang.

zh: 青色面色多与寒证或瘀血有关。
en: A greenish complexion is often related to cold syndrome or blood stasis.

zh: 赤色面色多与热证有关。
en: A reddish complexion is often related to heat syndrome.

zh: 黄色面色多与脾虚或湿证有关。
en: A yellow complexion is often related to spleen deficiency or dampness syndrome.

zh: 白色面色多与虚证或寒证有关。
en: A pale complexion is often related to deficiency syndrome or cold syndrome.

zh: 黑色面色多与肾虚或水饮有关。
en: A dark complexion is often related to kidney deficiency or water-fluid retention.

zh: 形体肥胖多与痰湿内盛有关。
en: Obesity is often related to internal exuberance of phlegm-dampness.

zh: 形体消瘦多与阴血不足有关。
en: Emaciation is often related to insufficiency of Yin and blood.

zh: 喜静懒动常提示阳气不足。
en: Preference for quietness and reluctance to move often indicate Yang-Qi insufficiency.

zh: 烦躁不安常提示热扰心神。
en: Restlessness often indicates heat disturbing the mind.

zh: 语声低怯多提示肺气不足。
en: A low weak voice often indicates insufficiency of lung-Qi.

zh: 语声重浊多提示痰湿阻滞。
en: A heavy turbid voice often indicates obstruction by phlegm-dampness.

zh: 呼吸急促多与肺气上逆有关。
en: Rapid breathing is often related to upward reversal of lung-Qi.

zh: 咳声清扬多提示风寒犯肺。
en: A clear ringing cough often indicates wind-cold invading the lungs.

zh: 咳声不扬多提示痰湿阻肺。
en: A muffled cough often indicates phlegm-dampness obstructing the lungs.

zh: 嗳气频作多与胃气上逆有关。
en: Frequent belching is often related to upward reversal of stomach-Qi.

zh: 呃逆连声多提示胃气上逆。
en: Repeated hiccup often indicates upward reversal of stomach-Qi.

zh: 呕吐酸腐多提示食积停胃。
en: Vomiting sour and putrid matter often indicates food accumulation retained in the stomach.

zh: 口臭明显多与胃热或食积有关。
en: Marked halitosis is often related to stomach heat or food accumulation.

zh: 喜热饮多提示寒证。
en: Preference for hot drinks often indicates cold syndrome.

zh: 喜冷饮多提示热证。
en: Preference for cold drinks often indicates heat syndrome.

zh: 饥而不食多与胃阴不足有关。
en: Hunger without eating is often related to insufficiency of stomach Yin.

zh: 多食易饥多与胃火炽盛有关。
en: Excessive appetite with easy hunger is often related to exuberant stomach fire.

zh: 大便黏滞多提示湿热下注。
en: Sticky stool often indicates downward flow of dampness-heat.

zh: 大便清稀多提示脾肾阳虚。
en: Clear watery stool often indicates Yang deficiency of the spleen and kidneys.

entities_gold.en: Yang deficiency of spleen and kidneys

entities_model.en: Yang deficiency of spleen and kidneys

zh: 尿频清长多与肾气不固有关。
en: Frequent clear urination is often related to insecurity of kidney-Qi.

zh: 尿少浮肿多与水液停聚有关。
en: Scanty urination with edema is often related to retention of body fluids.

zh: 月经量少多与血虚或血瘀有关。
en: Scanty menstruation is often related to blood deficiency or blood stasis.

zh: 月经提前多与血热有关。
en: Early menstruation is often related to blood heat.

zh: 月经后期多与血寒或血虚有关。
en: Delayed menstruation is often related to blood cold or blood deficiency.

zh: 经行腹痛多与寒凝或血瘀有关。
en: Menstrual abdominal pain is often related to cold congealing or blood stasis.

zh: 小儿夜啼多与心经积热有关。
en: Night crying in children is often related to accumulated heat in the Heart channel.

zh: 小儿惊惕多与肝风内动有关。
en: Fright and startle in children are often related to internal stirring of liver wind.

zh: 小儿口疮反复多与虚火上炎有关。
en: Recurrent aphtha in children is often related to deficiency fire flaring upward.

zh: 小儿厌食日久可导致脾胃气虚。
en: Prolonged anorexia in children can lead to Qi deficiency of the spleen and stomach.

zh: 小儿疳证日久可伤及肝肾。
en: Prolonged infantile malnutrition can damage the liver and kidneys.

zh: 小儿水肿反复多与脾肾亏虚有关。
en: Recurrent edema in children is often related to deficiency of the spleen and kidneys.

zh: 小儿遗尿频作多与下元虚寒有关。
en: Frequent enuresis in children is often related to deficiency cold in the lower origin.

zh: 小儿抽动频繁多与肝风痰火有关。
en: Frequent tic in children is often related to liver wind, phlegm and fire.

zh: 外科肿势高突多提示毒邪外发。
en: Elevated surgical swelling often indicates outward expression of pathogenic toxins.

zh: 外科肿势平塌多提示正气不足。
en: Flat surgical swelling often indicates insufficiency of healthy Qi.

zh: 外科红肿灼痛多提示热毒壅盛。
en: Red swelling with burning pain in surgery often indicates exuberant heat toxin.

zh: 外科肿块坚硬多提示痰瘀互结。
en: Hard surgical masses often indicate binding of phlegm and blood stasis.

zh: 外科脓液黄稠多提示阳证顺象。
en: Yellow thick pus in surgery often indicates a favorable sign of Yang syndrome.

zh: 外科脓液灰薄多提示阴证逆象。
en: Gray thin pus in surgery often indicates an unfavorable sign of Yin syndrome.

zh: 疮面红活多提示新肉渐生。
en: A fresh red wound surface often indicates gradual growth of new flesh.

zh: 疮面灰暗多提示正虚毒恋。
en: A gray dark wound surface often indicates healthy-Qi deficiency with lingering toxins.

zh: 表寒证多由风寒束表引起。
en: Exterior cold syndrome is often caused by wind-cold constraining the exterior.

zh: 表热证多由风热犯表引起。
en: Exterior heat syndrome is often caused by wind-heat invading the exterior.

zh: 半表半里证多与少阳枢机不利有关。
en: Half-exterior half-interior syndrome is often related to dysfunction of the Shaoyang pivot.

zh: 寒邪入里可损伤脏腑阳气。
en: Cold pathogen entering the interior can damage Yang-Qi of the Zang-Fu organs.

zh: 热邪入里可耗伤气阴。
en: Heat pathogen entering the interior can consume Qi and Yin.

zh: 虚证日久可累及多个脏腑。
en: Prolonged deficiency syndrome can involve multiple Zang-Fu organs.

zh: 实证日久可耗伤正气。
en: Prolonged excess syndrome can consume healthy Qi.

zh: 寒热错杂可见于厥阴病证。
en: Cold-heat complexity can be seen in Jueyin syndromes.

zh: 虚实夹杂反映正虚邪实。
en: Deficiency-excess complexity reflects healthy-Qi deficiency with pathogen excess.

zh: 阴盛阳衰可形成寒化病机。
en: Excess Yin with declining Yang can form a cold-transformation pathogenesis.

zh: 阳盛阴伤可形成热化病机。
en: Excess Yang damaging Yin can form a heat-transformation pathogenesis.

zh: 气虚日久可影响血液生成。
en: Prolonged Qi deficiency can affect blood production.

zh: 血虚日久可影响气的运行。
en: Prolonged blood deficiency can affect the movement of Qi.

zh: 津伤日久可导致阴液亏损。
en: Prolonged damage to body fluids can lead to depletion of Yin fluid.

zh: 精亏日久可影响生长发育。
en: Prolonged essence depletion can affect growth and development.

zh: 气机郁闭可阻碍三焦通行。
en: Constraint and blockage of Qi movement can obstruct passage through the triple Jiao.

zh: 三焦失畅可导致水液停聚。
en: Obstruction of the triple Jiao can cause retention of body fluids.

zh: 肺脾失调可影响津液输布。
en: Disharmony of the lungs and spleen can affect distribution of body fluids.

zh: 肝脾失调可影响气血生化。
en: Disharmony of the liver and spleen can affect generation of Qi and blood.

zh: 心肾失交可扰乱睡眠。
en: Disharmony between the heart and kidneys can disturb sleep.

zh: 肺肾失调可导致呼吸短促。
en: Disharmony between the lungs and kidneys can cause shortness of breath.

zh: 脾肾失调可导致水湿不化。
en: Disharmony between the spleen and kidneys can cause failure to transform water-dampness.

zh: 肝肾不足可使筋骨失养。
en: Insufficiency of the liver and kidneys can deprive tendons and bones of nourishment.

zh: 心肝火旺可扰乱神志。
en: Hyperactive heart and liver fire can disturb mental activities.

zh: 肺胃热盛可导致咽喉肿痛。
en: Exuberant heat in the lungs and stomach can cause throat swelling and pain.

zh: 脾胃寒湿可阻碍中焦气机。
en: Cold-dampness in the spleen and stomach can obstruct Qi movement in the middle Jiao.

zh: 肝胆郁热可影响胆汁排泄。
en: Depressed heat in the liver and gallbladder can affect bile excretion.

zh: 肾虚不固可导致精关失约。
en: Kidney deficiency with insecurity can cause failure to restrain the essence gate.

zh: 命门火弱可影响脾阳温化。
en: Weak Mingmen fire can affect warming transformation by spleen Yang.

zh: 胃火上炎可导致口舌生疮。
en: Stomach fire flaring upward can cause sores of the mouth and tongue.

zh: 心火下移可导致小便短赤。
en: Heart fire moving downward can cause scanty reddish urine.

zh: 肝火犯肺可导致咳嗽气逆。
en: Liver fire invading the lungs can cause cough and Qi reversal.

zh: 肺热移肠可导致大便秘结。
en: Lung heat moving to the intestine can cause constipation.

zh: 脾虚湿困可导致头身困重。
en: Spleen deficiency with dampness encumbrance can cause heaviness of the head and body.

zh: 痰热结胸可导致胸膈痞满。
en: Phlegm-heat binding in the chest can cause fullness in the chest and diaphragm.

zh: 寒饮伏肺可导致咳喘反复。
en: Cold fluid hidden in the lungs can cause recurrent cough and panting.

zh: 湿浊中阻可导致脘腹痞闷。
en: Damp turbidity obstructing the middle can cause epigastric and abdominal fullness.

zh: 瘀阻胞宫可导致月经不调。
en: Stasis obstructing the uterus can cause menstrual irregularity.

zh: 冲任不固可导致崩漏。
en: Insecurity of the Thoroughfare and Conception vessels can cause metrorrhagia and metrostaxis.

zh: 肝郁化热可影响冲任调节。
en: Liver depression transforming into heat can affect regulation of the Thoroughfare and Conception vessels.

zh: 小儿肺热闭郁可导致喘咳痰鸣。
en: Obstructed lung heat in children can cause panting, cough and phlegm rale.

zh: 小儿痰湿内阻可导致纳呆腹胀。
en: Internal obstruction by phlegm-dampness in children can cause poor appetite and abdominal distension.

zh: 小儿脾肾阳虚可导致久泻清稀。
en: Yang deficiency of the spleen and kidneys in children can cause prolonged clear diarrhea.

zh: 小儿心肝火旺可导致烦躁夜啼。
en: Hyperactive heart and liver fire in children can cause irritability and night crying.

zh: 小儿肾精不足可导致齿迟行迟。
en: Insufficiency of kidney essence in children can cause delayed teething and walking.

zh: 外科风热毒邪可导致局部红肿。
en: Wind-heat toxins in surgery can cause local redness and swelling.

zh: 外科痰瘀互结可形成坚硬肿块。
en: Binding of phlegm and blood stasis in surgery can form hard masses.

zh: 外科湿热下注可导致肛门肿痛。
en: Downward flow of dampness-heat in surgery can cause anal swelling and pain.

zh: 外科气滞血瘀可使疼痛固定。
en: Qi stagnation and blood stasis in surgery can make pain fixed.

zh: 外科脾虚湿困可使创面渗液。
en: Spleen deficiency with dampness encumbrance in surgery can cause wound exudation.

zh: 肺气不足可使卫表失于固护。
en: Insufficiency of lung-Qi can deprive the defensive exterior of protection.

zh: 脾阳虚弱可使中焦寒湿内生。
en: Weakness of spleen Yang can cause endogenous cold-dampness in the middle Jiao.

zh: 肝气郁滞可使胆汁疏泄不畅。
en: Stagnation of Liver-Qi can impair the free flow of bile.

zh: 肾精亏虚可使髓海不足。
en: Deficiency of kidney essence can lead to insufficiency of the sea of marrow.

zh: 营血亏虚可使肌肤失于濡养。
en: Deficiency of nutrient blood can deprive the skin of nourishment.

zh: 卫阳不固可导致汗出恶风。
en: Insecurity of defensive Yang can cause sweating and aversion to wind.

zh: 痰瘀互结可阻滞经络气血。
en: Binding of phlegm and blood stasis can obstruct Qi and blood in the meridians.

entities.en: binding of phlegm and blood stasis

entities_gold.en: binding of phlegm and blood stasis

entities_model.en: binding of phlegm and blood stasis

entities_eval.en: binding of phlegm and blood stasis

zh: 热毒内陷可扰乱营血运行。
en: Internal sinking of heat toxin can disturb the movement of nutrient blood.

zh: 小儿肺脾两虚可使咳喘反复。
en: Deficiency of the lungs and spleen in children can cause recurrent cough and panting.

zh: 小儿湿热蕴脾可影响运化功能。
en: Dampness-heat accumulating in the spleen in children can affect transportation and transformation.

zh: 外科正气不足可使疮面久不生肌。
en: Insufficiency of healthy Qi in surgery can prevent granulation from growing on the wound surface for a long time.
